titles.en: The meaning of the beautiful overlooking
The meaning of the beautiful overlooking

segments: : أخبرنا أحمد بن محمد بن سعيد الهمداني قال: حدثنا علي بن الحسن بن فضال، عن أبيه، قال: قال الرضا عليه السلام في قوله الله عز وجل: " فاصفح الصفح الجميل " قال: العفو من غير عتاب.
arabic.text: : أخبرنا أحمد بن محمد بن سعيد الهمداني قال: حدثنا علي بن الحسن بن فضال، عن أبيه، قال: قال الرضا عليه السلام في قوله الله عز وجل: " فاصفح الصفح الجميل " قال: العفو من غير عتاب.

segments: 1. We were told by Muhammed bin Ibrahim bin Ishaq al-Talaqani, that he said: We were informed by Ahmad bin Muhammed bin Sa’eed al-Hamadani, that he said: We were told by Ali bin Hasan bin Faddal, from his father, that he said: Al-Rida, peace be upon him, said with regards to the saying of Allah, Exalted and Glorious is He: «So, overlook (in the act of) the beautiful overlooking.» [15:85] He said: To pardon without gentle reproach.
en.basel-kadem.text: 1. We were told by Muhammed bin Ibrahim bin Ishaq al-Talaqani, that he said: We were informed by Ahmad bin Muhammed bin Sa’eed al-Hamadani, that he said: We were told by Ali bin Hasan bin Faddal, from his father, that he said: Al-Rida, peace be upon him, said with regards to the saying of Allah, Exalted and Glorious is He: «So, overlook (in the act of) the beautiful overlooking.» [15:85] He said: To pardon without gentle reproach.

narratorChain.raw: حدثنا محمد بن إبراهيم بن إسحاق الطالقاني، قال

parts.text: محمد بن إبراهيم بن إسحاق الطالقاني، قال
